description: render the inference handoff (best_model.json + best_model_inference_spec.yaml) from a finished run's deft_state.json
rules: picks the iteration (baseline or iterN) with the lowest far_pct from deft_state.json
best_model.json carries checkpoint, threshold, far_pct, iteration, backbone, images_dir, training_spec

best_model_inference_spec.yaml copies model+dataset architecture verbatim from the training spec so it matches the checkpoint; strips train/eval/export blocks and wires the KPI threshold as eval_margin
inference.checkpoint is the in-container mount /model/best.pth; the consumer mounts best_model.json.checkpoint there
never hand-edit either file — keeping them in sync is this operation's job
usage: Set RESULTS_DIR (a completed run dir containing deft_state.json whose config.specs_file points at the training spec) and RECORD_STORE. Writes ${RECORD_STORE}/best_model.json and ${RECORD_STORE}/best_model_inference_spec.yaml. The consumer fills only the inference CSV + images_dir overrides.
limitation: Read-only handoff render; runs no inference. Requires deft_state.json to have at least one iteration with far_pct and a resolvable training spec, or it falls back to placeholder artifacts. Needs PyYAML.
